## Swarm Overview

**Goal:** [What this swarm is designed to accomplish]

**Success Criteria:** [How you know a run succeeded]

**Failure Criteria:** [How you know a run failed — not just "no output"]

**Trigger:** [What starts a run — schedule / event / API call / human request]

**Output:** [What artifact or action the swarm produces]

**Human Review Point(s):** [Who reviews output before real-world consequences, and when]

**Total Agents:** N

**Estimated Run Time:** [Per run]

**Operational Cadence:** [How often it runs]

## Agent Roster

### Agent 1: [Name]
- **Role Type:** Research / Analysis / Execution / Validation / Orchestrator / Monitor
- **Mandate:** [Single sentence: "This agent exists to [verb] [object] within [constraint]"]
- **Inputs:** [What triggers this agent and what data it receives]
- **Outputs:** [What it produces and where it goes]
- **Tools/Access:** [What external systems, APIs, or data sources it can access]
- **Memory:** [What state it maintains between runs]
- **Escalation Triggers:**
  - Uncertainty > [threshold]: escalate to [named human] via [channel]
  - [Specific condition]: escalate to [named human] via [channel]
  - Timeout: if no response in [N] hours, [fallback behavior]
- **Out of Scope:** [What this agent explicitly should NOT do]

### Agent 2: [Name]
*(repeat structure)*

## Communication Architecture

```
[Agent A] ──→ [Agent B] ──→ [Agent C]
                              │
                              ↓
                         [Orchestrator] ──→ [Human Review] ──→ [Agent D (Execution)]
```

### Communication Protocols

| Source | Target | Trigger | Format | Acknowledgment Required? |
|--------|--------|---------|--------|--------------------------|
| [Agent A] | [Agent B] | [Agent A completes task] | [JSON / Markdown / Dict] | Yes / No |
| [Agent B] | [Orchestrator] | [Agent B produces output] | [Format] | Yes / No |

---

## Shared Memory Design

| Memory Store | Owner | Writers | Readers | Retention | Schema/Format |
|-------------|-------|---------|---------|-----------|---------------|
| [Store Name] | [Agent X] | [Agent X, Y] | [Agent X, Y, Z] | [Duration / Until superseded] | [Brief schema] |

**Conflict Resolution Policy:** [What happens when two agents write conflicting data to the same store?]

**Corruption Recovery:** [How shared memory is restored if it becomes invalid]

---

## Escalation Structure

| Agent | Trigger | Escalation Target | Channel | Timeout | Fallback |
|-------|---------|-------------------|---------|---------|----------|
| [Agent A] | Confidence < 70% | [Named Human] | [Slack/#channel / email] | 4 hours | Halt and notify |
| [Agent B] | Irreversible action pending | [Named Human] | [Channel] | 2 hours | Halt |
| All agents | System error / exception | [Named Human] | [Channel] | 1 hour | Halt all |

---

## Operational Schedule

```
[Trigger at HH:MM UTC]
    │
    ↓
[Agent A: Research Phase] (est. NN min)
    │
    ↓
[Agent B: Analysis Phase] (est. NN min)
    │
    ↓
[SYNC CHECKPOINT: Orchestrator validates outputs]
    │
    ├── [If issues found] → Escalate to human
    │
    ↓
[Agent C: Validation] (est. NN min)
    │
    ↓
[HUMAN REVIEW WINDOW: NN hours]
    │
    ├── [If no action] → Auto-proceed
    ├── [If approved] → Agent D executes
    └── [If rejected] → Log and halt
    │
    ↓
[Agent D: Execution] (if approved)
    │
    ↓
[Run complete: log results, clear ephemeral state]
```

**Maximum Run Duration:** [N hours — halt and alert if exceeded]

**Minimum Gap Between Runs:** [N hours — prevents runaway re-triggering]

---

## Risk Map

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|--------|-----------|
| [Risk 1] | Low/Med/High | Low/Med/High | [Specific mitigation] |
| Memory drift | Medium | High | TTL on all shared memory; validation on reads |
| Escalation failure | Low | High | Backup escalation target; default to halt |
| [Risk N] | | | |
